finding: D. Acute toxic poisoning = impairment of mitochondrial cellular respiratory enzymes
context: Action:   inhibition of electron transport Site:   preferentially affects globus pallidus (a)  acute phase √  foci of T2-hyperintensity √  restricted diffusion (b)  delayed √  delayed leukoencephalopathy in deep white matter √  T1 shortening in globus pallidus rare in children: Action:   blockage of trivalent iron in respiratory chain √  hemorrhagic necrosis in putamen √  hemorrhagic necrosis in putamen √  ± white matter edema √  hypoattenuating areas in lentiform nuclei + corpus callosum + subcortical deep white matter in frontal and parietooccipital regions
